TLINE.TDLINE: INCLUDE &T001G-TXTAB& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTFU& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTKO& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &T001-SPRAS&
*-Info line if you know the customer./vendor's acct or clerk-*
*-Info line if you do not know the customer./vendor's acct or clerk-*
*- Info.line if we have account/clerk at customer/vendor -------------*
*- Info.line if we have no account/clerk at customer/vendor ----------*
* Text elements for the letter and line item list *
In connection with the checking of our year-end closing, we would ask
you to compare the open items listed in the line item list from
&RF130-ABSTIDAT& with your ledgers and to confirm the agreement with the
balance on the last page of this letter up until the &RF130-RUECKDAT&.
If, on checking, you discover any differences, please let us know so
that the reasons for these differences can be ascertained.
Please find enclosed an envelope for your reply and statement of any
We look forward to hearing from you soon.
As part of the verification process for our year-end closing operations,
we would be obliged if you could compare the open items listed in the
line item list from the &RF130-ABSTIDAT& with your ledgers.
If, on checking, you should discover any differences, or if you are
unable to check the balance, please state this on the last page of this
letter before &RF130-RUECKDAT&. A statement of any differences found
would help us to ascertain the reasons for such differences. We enclose
an envelope for your reply, as well as for a statement of any
If the balance on the last page of this letter agrees with your ledgers
then you do not need to reply.
We look forward to hearing from you soon.
As part of the verification process for our year-end closing operations,
we would be obliged if you could enter on the last page of this letter
the balance of our open items with you up until &RF130-ABSTIDAT&. If
possible, please include in your reply a list of the items that are
still open on the reconciliation key date.
Please find enclosed an envelope for your reply and the list of open
items. We would be obliged if you would reply before &RF130-RUECKDAT&.
We look forward to hearing from you soon.
Since we have, as yet, not received a reply to our request of
&RF130-UAUSTDAT& for a statement, we would like to ask you once again to
compare the open items listed in the line item list from the
&RF130-ABSTIDAT& with your ledger and to confirm whether they agree with
the balance on the last page of this letter up until the
&RF130-RUECKDAT&. If, on checking, you discover any differences, please
send us a statement of these, so that we may ascertain the reasons for
We enclose an envelope for your reply and a list of any differences.
If, in the interim, you have already sent a reply, please disregard this
We look forward to hearing from you soon.
Since we have, as yet, not received a reply to our request of
&RF130-UAUSTDAT& for a statement, we would like to ask you once again to
check and confirm the balance of the open items listed on the last page
of this letter up until &RF130-ABSTIDAT&. If possible, please include
in your reply a list of the items that are still open on the
We enclose an envelope for your reply and list of open items. We would
be obliged if you would reply before &RF130-RUECKDAT&.
If, in the interim, you have sent your reply, please disregard this
We look forward to hearing from you soon.
*- Column headings for list of open items ----------------------------*
*- Branch address displayed in list of open items ------------------- *
*- Data on open item for itemization ---------------------------------*
*- Using field RF130-KONTO, the branch account number can be ---------*
*- displayed for a head office, or the head office account number ----*
*- can be displayed for a branch in local processing -----------------*
No open items at key date &RF130-ABSTIDAT&.
*- No open items posted to branch or -------------------------------- *
No open items on account &RF130-KONTO& at key date &RF130-ABSTIDAT&.
*- Centrally processed branch has no open items on the head -------- *
No open items for branch &RF130-KONTO& at key date &RF130-ABSTIDAT&
